violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as egg whites and liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as ganache) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Luster dusts that were unknown to be edible or labelled as inedible were observed in establishment. PIC informed to remove from premises. Food shall be protected from contamination that may result from the addition of unsafe or unapproved food or color additives. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Packaged foods were removed from self-service sale and placed behind the sales counter. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
